commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ba073fd95e303a4b1e7dab1e0057a2fa14358d2f)
commands.review_summary:
The branch expands OpenCode Go provider catalog metadata, docs, and tests, changes onboarding to persist the static catalog, adds Qwen tiered pricing, and includes a proof screenshot.

PR surface: Source +69, Tests +108, Docs +12, Other 0. Total +189 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR blockers at source level: the diff writes a full provider catalog during onboarding and adds tieredPricing, while current main and the merged related PR keep onboarding pass-through and representable flat pricing. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor proof is still needed, and maintainers should decide whether to salvage verified metadata deltas or ask for a fresh narrower PR after the blocking architecture changes are removed.

target.title: fix(opencode-go): complete catalog, onboarding, and tiered pricing
target.body:
## Summary

Closes #91238.

This PR completes the OpenCode Go catalog repair initially attempted in #91351. The prior fix was incomplete — it only added Flat Pricing assertions in test files without implementing the official tiered pricing in \provider-catalog.ts\.

### Changes

- **New model entries** in \extensions/opencode-go/provider-catalog.ts\:
  - \minimax-m3\: \^Gnthropic-messages\ API, **512K context** (per OpenCode Go), \.90/\.60 (3× base pricing)
  - \qwen3.7-max\: \^Gnthropic-messages\ API, 1M context, \.50/\.50
  - \qwen3.7-plus\: \^Gnthropic-messages\ API, 1M context, \.40/\.60 (≤256K tier)
  - \hy3-preview\, \mimo-v2-omni\, \mimo-v2-pro\ — additional bundled entries
  - **\kimi-k2.7-code\**: Added per official docs (\openai-completions\, 262K ctx, \.95/\.00/\.19 cache)
- **API protocol fix**: \minimax-m2.7\ and \qwen3.6-plus\ corrected from \openai-completions\ to \^Gnthropic-messages\
- **Tiered pricing**: \qwen3.7-plus\ and \qwen3.6-plus\ now use proper split pricing at 256K tokens per [docs](https://opencode.ai/docs/zh-tw/go/)
- **Context fix**: \qwen3.6-plus\ corrected from 262K → 1M context window
- **Pricing fixes** (5 corrections via automated verification): DeepSeek V4 Pro/Flash cacheRead (factor 10), MiMo V2.5/V2.5 Pro input/output/cacheRead, MiniMax M2.5 cacheRead
- **Pricing fix**: \minimax-m2.5\ and \minimax-m2.7\ \cacheWrite\ corrected from \ → proper values; added missing \cacheWrite: 0\ to \minimax-m3\
- **Onboarding fix**: \^GpplyOpencodeGoProviderConfig()\ now actually applies the bundled catalog
- **Merge resolution with upstream/main**: resolved 6 conflict regions in \provider-catalog.ts\ and 4 in \index.test.ts\, merging tiered pricing + live discovery with new model entries
- **Tests and docs** updated to match the runtime catalog

### Verification
- All **16 tests pass** across 4 test files
- Docs table updated with 3 missing model rows (\hy3-preview\, \mimo-v2.5\, \mimo-v2.5-pro\)

### Related
- Closes #91238
- #91351 — initial incomplete attempt
- #90088 — similar \model_not_found\ issue

/cc @samson910022
target.author: samson910022

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
